title: genista mugronensis subsp. rigidissima
intro: Genista mugronensis subsp. rigidissima, also known as Genista rigidissima, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, specifically a subspecies of the broom shrub. It is primarily found in the Iberian Peninsula, where it grows in dry, rocky areas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Genista mugronensis subsp. rigidissima can be used to make herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits including antioxidant and immune-boosting effects, as well as potentially reducing stress and anxiety.
